# snapcd_agent (Resource)

Manages an Agent in Snap CD.


## Example Usage

```terraform
// Fetch the Service Principal the Agent authenticates as.
data "snapcd_service_principal" "my_service_principal" {
  client_id = "MyAgentServicePrincipal"
}

resource "snapcd_agent" "my_agent" {
  name                     = "MyAgent"
  service_principal_id     = data.snapcd_service_principal.my_service_principal.id
  allow_multiple_instances = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name of the Agent.
- `service_principal_id` (String) ID of the Service Principal that the Agent authenticates as.

### Optional

- `allow_multiple_instances` (Boolean) Setting this to 'true' allows you to connect multiple instances of this Agent simultaneously.
- `is_disabled` (Boolean) Indicates whether or not the Agent is disabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique ID of the Agent.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
RESOURCE_ID="12345678-90ab-cdef-1234-56789abcdef0"
terraform import snapcd_agent.this $RESOURCE_ID
```
